button.name: action_psm_receive_request
button.invisible: archive or x_psm_0502_received_at

button.name: action_psm_mark_inspected
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_inspection_result or x_psm_0502_inspected_at

button.name: action_psm_notify_lead
button.invisible: archive or maintenance_type != 'preventive' or x_psm_0502_request_source_code != 'preventive_schedule'

button.name: action_psm_acknowledge_lead_assignment
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_lead_notified_user_id or x_psm_0502_lead_acknowledgment_status == 'acknowledged' or x_psm_0502_lead_notified_user_id != uid

button.name: action_psm_mark_planned
button.invisible: archive or not schedule_date or not user_id or x_psm_0502_planned_at or not x_psm_0502_ready_to_plan

button.name: action_psm_create_fsm_task
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_planned_at or x_psm_0502_fsm_task_id

button.name: action_psm_open_fsm_task
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_fsm_task_id

button.name: action_psm_mark_execution_started
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_fsm_task_id or x_psm_0502_execution_started_at or x_psm_0502_execution_completed_at

button.name: action_psm_mark_execution_completed
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_fsm_task_id or not x_psm_0502_execution_started_at or x_psm_0502_execution_completed_at or not x_psm_0502_fsm_is_closed

button.name: action_psm_mark_acceptance_reviewed
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_execution_completed_at or not x_psm_0502_acceptance_result or x_psm_0502_acceptance_reviewed_at

button.name: action_psm_reopen_for_rework
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_acceptance_reviewed_at or x_psm_0502_acceptance_result not in ('follow_up_needed', 'rework_required')

button.name: action_psm_reopen_for_rework
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_acceptance_reviewed_at or x_psm_0502_acceptance_result not in ('follow_up_needed', 'rework_required')

button.name: action_psm_mark_proposed
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_root_cause_analysis or not x_psm_0502_technical_solution or not x_psm_0502_estimated_cost or not x_psm_0502_estimated_timeline or x_psm_0502_proposed_at

button.name: action_psm_submit_for_approval
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_proposed_at or x_psm_0502_approval_status == 'pending' or x_psm_0502_approval_status == 'approved'

button.name: action_psm_approve_proposal
button.invisible: archive or x_psm_0502_approval_status != 'pending'

button.name: action_psm_reject_proposal
button.invisible: archive or x_psm_0502_approval_status != 'pending'

button.name: action_psm_mark_service_assessed
button.invisible: archive or x_psm_0502_approval_status != 'approved' or x_psm_0502_service_assessed_at

button.name: action_psm_mark_material_checked
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_service_assessed_at or x_psm_0502_need_outside_service or x_psm_0502_material_checked_at

button.name: action_psm_create_stock_picking
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_material_checked_at or not x_psm_0502_has_material_request or x_psm_0502_stock_picking_id

button.name: action_psm_open_stock_picking
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_stock_picking_id

button.name: action_psm_check_stock_availability
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_stock_picking_id or not x_psm_0502_has_material_request or x_psm_0502_stock_picking_state == 'done' or x_psm_0502_stock_picking_state == 'cancel'

button.name: action_psm_recheck_stock_after_purchase
button.invisible: archive or (x_psm_0502_purchase_order_state != 'purchase' and x_psm_0502_purchase_order_state != 'done') or x_psm_0502_stock_check_result != 'not_available'

button.name: action_psm_submit_material_approval
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_stock_picking_id or x_psm_0502_stock_check_result != 'available' or x_psm_0502_material_approval_status == 'pending' or x_psm_0502_material_approval_status == 'approved'

button.name: action_psm_approve_material_request
button.invisible: archive or x_psm_0502_material_approval_status != 'pending'

button.name: action_psm_reject_material_request
button.invisible: archive or x_psm_0502_material_approval_status != 'pending'

button.name: action_psm_validate_stock_picking
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_stock_picking_id or x_psm_0502_material_approval_status != 'approved' or x_psm_0502_stock_picking_state == 'done' or x_psm_0502_stock_picking_state == 'cancel'

button.name: action_psm_mark_stock_issued
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_stock_picking_id or x_psm_0502_stock_picking_state != 'done' or x_psm_0502_stock_issued_at

button.name: action_psm_create_purchase_order
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_has_material_request or x_psm_0502_need_outside_service or x_psm_0502_stock_check_result != 'not_available' or (x_psm_0502_purchase_order_id and x_psm_0502_purchase_order_state != 'cancel')

button.name: action_psm_open_purchase_order
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_purchase_order_id

button.name: action_psm_open_outside_service_request
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_outside_service_request_id

button.name: action_psm_print_inspection_report
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_inspected_at

button.name: action_psm_print_treatment_proposal
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_proposed_at

button.name: action_psm_print_material_issue_request
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_has_material_request

button.name: action_psm_print_acceptance_record
button.invisible: archive or not x_psm_0502_acceptance_reviewed_at

field.name: x_psm_0502_source_note
field.placeholder: Record the upstream source mapping or origin context...

field.name: x_psm_0502_intake_template_guide
field.placeholder: The request type intake guidance will appear here...

field.name: x_psm_0502_intake_problem_detail
field.placeholder: Record the detailed initial problem or maintenance need...

field.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_note
field.placeholder: Record the initial on-site inspection findings...

field.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_checklist_result
field.placeholder: Record the actual checklist result based on the equipment category template...

field.name: x_psm_0502_inspection_worksheet
field.placeholder: Record the structured worksheet note for the initial inspection...

field.name: x_psm_0502_plan_note
field.placeholder: Record the phase 1 planning note...

field.name: x_psm_0502_plan_change_reason
field.placeholder: Record the reason when the planned schedule or responsible user is revised...

field.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_template_guide
field.placeholder: The request type proposal guidance will appear here...

field.name: x_psm_0502_root_cause_analysis
field.placeholder: Record the identified root cause...

field.name: x_psm_0502_technical_solution
field.placeholder: Record the proposed technical solution...

field.name: x_psm_0502_cost_note
field.placeholder: Record the cost assumptions or cost breakdown...

field.name: x_psm_0502_timeline_note
field.placeholder: Record the timeline assumptions or sequencing note...

field.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_change_reason
field.placeholder: Record the reason when a proposed treatment proposal is revised...

field.name: x_psm_0502_treatment_proposal
field.placeholder: The structured proposal summary will be generated when marking this request as proposed...

field.name: x_psm_0502_proposal_document
field.placeholder: The proposal document artifact will be generated when marking this request as proposed...

field.name: x_psm_0502_approval_note
field.placeholder: Record the approval or rejection note...

field.name: x_psm_0502_service_assessment_note
field.placeholder: Record why the request can be handled internally or why it needs outside service...

field.name: x_psm_0502_material_assessment_note
field.placeholder: Record whether material is required before continuing the repair...

field.name: x_psm_0502_material_approval_note
field.placeholder: Record the approval or rejection note for the material issue step...

field.name: x_psm_0502_execution_note
field.placeholder: Execution summary will be synchronized from the linked FSM task when execution is completed...

field.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_note
field.placeholder: Record the store acceptance conclusion and evaluation after maintenance...

field.name: x_psm_0502_acceptance_follow_up_note
field.placeholder: Record the follow-up or rework requirement if the maintenance result is not fully accepted...

filter.name: filter_psm_overdue_queue
filter.domain: ['&', '&', ('archive', '=', False), ('stage_id.done', '=', False), '|', '&', ('schedule_date', '!=', False), ('schedule_date', '<', context_today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')), '&', ('schedule_date', '=', False), ('request_date', '<', context_today())]

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co yeu cau nao can lap ke hoach trong luong 0502.
Danh sach nay tong hop cac yeu cau preventive da duoc notify cho CMT Lead va cac yeu cau phat sinh tu cua hang da duoc kiem tra voi ket luan can xu ly.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co preventive request nao trong queue 0502.
Danh sach nay giup CMT Lead theo doi rieng cac preventive request da duoc notify.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co store request nao can xu ly trong queue 0502.
Danh sach nay tap trung vao cac request cua hang da qua kiem tra va duoc ket luan can xu ly.

record.field: ['&', '&', ('archive', '=', False), ('stage_id.done', '=', False), '|', '&', ('schedule_date', '!=', False), ('schedule_date', '<', context_today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')), '&', ('schedule_date', '=', False), ('request_date', '<', context_today())]

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request overdue nao trong queue 0502.
Danh sach nay giup CMT Lead uu tien cac request da qua han hoac da ton dong.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request nao ready to plan trong queue 0502.
Danh sach nay tap trung vao cac request da du dieu kien de CMT Lead lap ke hoach ma khong phai kiem tra lai tung block reason thu cong.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request critical nao trong queue 0502.
Danh sach nay giup CMT Lead uu tien nhom request co rui ro cao, dung thiet bi, hoac muc do khan cap can xu ly ngay.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request nao da gan lead trong queue 0502.
Danh sach nay giup nhin ro request nao da duoc giao ownership cho lead nao de tong hop va dieu phoi dung nguoi dung viec.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request nao trong monitoring 0502.
Man hinh nay dung de theo doi tong hop cac request 0502 o muc request, phuc vu nhin nhanh so request dang mo, overdue, preventive va follow-up needed.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request nao trong progress monitoring 0502.
Man hinh nay giup nhin nhanh request dang tac o checkpoint nao trong luong nghiep vu 0502 de uu tien giai quyet diem nghen van hanh.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request overdue nao trong monitoring 0502.
Man hinh nay tap trung vao cac request 0502 da qua han hoac dang ton dong de CMT Lead uu tien xu ly.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request nao trong supply monitoring 0502.
Man hinh nay tap trung theo doi nhanh vat tu noi bo, xuat kho va mua ngoai de nhin ro request dang cho kho hay dang cho mua hang.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co preventive request nao trong monitoring 0502.
Man hinh nay giup lead theo doi rieng nhom preventive request trong luong 0502.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request nao trong intake SLA monitoring 0502.
Man hinh nay dung de theo doi checkpoint tiep nhan theo SLA, gom nhom pending, on time va late de CMT de nhin backlog dau vao.

field.name: help
field.p: Chua co request follow-up needed nao trong monitoring 0502.
Man hinh nay giup lead nhin nhanh cac request da nghiem thu nhung can theo doi hoac xu ly bo sung.
